Fields.Name: Base Toughness Recovery Time
Fields.Description: This is the basic value of toughness recovery time. (Seconds)

Fields.Name: Chr Event Turn - By Left 90
Fields.Description: This is a 90  left turn animation for the Character Turn event.

Fields.Name: Chr Event Turn - By Right 90
Fields.Description: This is a 90  right turn animation for the Character Turn event.

Fields.Name: Chr Event Turn - By Left 180
Fields.Description: This is a 180  left turn animation for the Character Turn event.

Fields.Name: Chr Event Turn - By Right 180
Fields.Description: This is a 180  right turn animation for the Character Turn event.

Fields.Name: Chr Event Turn - 90 Turn Start Angle
Fields.Description: The starting angle of the angle to which the 90  swivel animation for the Character Swirl event is applied. If the event starts at an angle smaller than this angle, a system turn will occur.

Fields.Name: Chr Event Turn - 180 Turn Start Angle
Fields.Description: The starting angle of the angle to which the 180  swivel animation for the Character Swirl event is applied.

Fields.Name: Stealth Attack Multiplier
Fields.Description: Stealth attack damage multiplier

Fields.Name: Weapon Rebel Absorption on Successful Guard
Fields.Description: Damage cut rate when the guard is successful when repelled. Multiply the final damage

Fields.Name: NPC Talk Anim - Start Diff Angle
Fields.Description: This is the difference angle at which the animation playback of the motion during the conversation of the NPC conversation starts.

Fields.Name: NPC Talk Anim - End Diff Angle
Fields.Description: This is the difference angle at which the animation playback of the motion during the conversation of the NPC conversation is stopped.

Fields.Name: Marika Stake Area Radius
Fields.Description: Retry area radius_default value (m). It is used as the default value when the radius and area are not set in the event type Retry Point of MapStudio.

Fields.Name: Sleep Collector SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: A special effect ID that activates when a Nemuri item can be acquired. TAE flag Used as the default value when not overwriting with Event> Nemuri item registration.

Fields.Name: Recovery below HP Max - Notification SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: ID of the special effect that notifies that Recovery below HP maximum is completed. Mainly used for multi synchronization.

Fields.Description: Absorption effect SFXID when recovering the number of times the HP Est bottle has been used when defeating an intruder

Fields.Description: Absorption effect SFXID when recovering the number of times the MP Est bottle has been used when defeating an intruder

Fields.Name: Flask - Absorption SFX Playback Time

Fields.Description: Correction value of the amount of soul acquired by the host when defeating the boss in multiplayer

Fields.Description: Offset value [pixel] (FullHD standard) that fits in the screen when the enemy's HP gauge is cut off on the screen

Fields.Name: After Ending Return Point Entity ID
Fields.Description: Entity ID of return point on hold

Fields.Name: Enemy Detection - Bullet ID (Co-op/Anti-Invader)

Fields.Name: Activated Marika Stake Dialog Text ID

Fields.Name: Opened Summoning Pool Player Animation ID

Fields.Name: World Map Point - Re-entry Expand Range
Fields.Description: The default extended distance for the map point's entry area. When the participation area overwrite area of the map point is invalid (-1), the participation area is generated by expanding from its own area. Its extended distance

Fields.Name: Network Player Threat Notification - Notify Time
Fields.Description: Network PC Threat Level Notification_Notification Time [seconds] (SEQ21950)

Fields.Name: Phantom Bloody Finger - Count
Fields.Description: Number of re-invasion items to be given at the time of intrusion Intrusion item_Greater system (ID102)

Fields.Name: Phantom Bloody Finger - Goods ID
Fields.Description: Tool item ID of re-invasion item given at the time of intrusion Invasion item_Greater system (ID102)

Fields.Name: Spiritspring SFX ID
Fields.Description: Big jump to get off _ sky SFXID

Fields.Name: Phantom Bloody Finger - Count
Fields.Description: Number of re-invasion items to be given at the time of intrusion Intrusion item_Greater disposable (ID111)

Fields.Name: Phantom Recusant Finger - Count
Fields.Description: Number of re-invasion items to be given at the time of invasion Invasion item_Volcano building system (ID112)

Fields.Name: Flask Recharge Timer
Fields.Description: The amount of time in seconds it takes to receive an automatic flask recharge, while on expedition and outside of night bosses/Nightlord battles. 0 disables the mechanic.

Fields.Name: Near Death Duration in Boss Arena
Fields.Description: Near-death timer duration in boss arenas. Arenas apply special effect 102120 every frame, which overrides the near-death timer, preventing it from decaying. The death timer is also hidden when this special effect is applied.

Fields.Name: Default Duration for Near Death Grace
Fields.Description: The default duration for the near death grace period, during which the death timer is frozen and damage decay doesn't happen.

Fields.Name: Required Revive Progress: Death Severity 1
Fields.Description: Damage required to revive player when near death severity level is 1.

Fields.Name: Required Revive Progress: Death Severity 2
Fields.Description: Damage required to revive player when near death severity level is 2.

Fields.Name: Required Revive Progress: Death Severity 3
Fields.Description: Damage required to revive player when near death severity level is 3 or greater.

Fields.Name: Revive Progress Decay: Death Severity 1
Fields.Description: A percentage used to calculate how much reviveProgress increases per second when nearDeathSeverityLevel is 1. (Rate = RequiredReviveProgress_Level1 * ReviveRateDecayPercent_Level1 / 100.0 per frame).

Fields.Name: Revive Progress Decay: Death Severity 2
Fields.Description: Similar to above, for nearDeathSeverityLevel 2.

Fields.Name: Revive Progress Decay: Death Severity 3
Fields.Description: Similar to above, for nearDeathSeverityLevel greater than 2.
